description: Demonstration SLO for analyzing the IB-T002/IB-T004 mock-loopback evidence runs with the IB-T005 analysis core. Model-serving SLOs are declared ONLY from measurement (slo.schema.json normative rule); every threshold below is derived from the measured maxima of the ib-t004 calibration/scenario evidence, rounded up one honest headroom step. This SLO exists so goodput@SLO can be exercised end-to-end on real raw events; it is NOT a production target.

applies_to.workload_ref: ib-t002/ib-t004 smoke, calibration, cancellation and slow-client runs (gateway-mock, loopback)

provenance.source: inferbench docs/evidence/ib-t002 + ib-t004 raw events (largest observed client TTFT 0.634 s, smoke-A non-streaming full-response read; calibrated streaming points 0.102-0.440 s, docs/evidence/ib-t004/calibration.md)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured suite maximum 0.634 s rounded up to 0.75 s

provenance.source: inferbench docs/evidence/ib-t002 + ib-t004 raw events (largest observed e2e 3.112 s on the throttled slow-client run slow-on; calibration maximum 2.751 s)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured suite maximum 3.112 s rounded up to 5.0 s

provenance.source: inferbench docs/evidence/ib-t002 + ib-t004 raw events (largest observed inter-chunk stall 0.227 s, calib-B at configured ITL 20 ms under 300 ms TTFT; slow-on pacing-granularity stalls up to 0.114 s)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured suite maximum 0.227 s rounded up to 0.25 s; also the stall threshold used for stall_rate

notes: Per-request evaluation: statistic 'max' objectives read exactly as per-request bounds, which is how the analyzer applies them (DistServe-style per-request SLO attainment). Declared thresholds are measured-derived as of 2026-07-10; re-derive when the target or topology changes.
